query: SELECT id, name, type, description, rating, icon FROM places WHERE type IN ('island', 'activity_spot') ORDER BY type, name LIMIT 10
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute SELECT id, name, type, description, rating, icon FROM places WHERE type IN ('island', 'activity_spot') ORDER BY type, name LIMIT 10

rows.name: Alifushi
